title: selaginella decurrens
intro: Selaginella decurrens, a species of the Selaginella genus, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss. It is native to various tropical regions around the world and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Selaginella decurrens is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and its extracts are also used in traditional remedies.
